title: daemon/main.rs: bootstrap creates space without creator member — space_member FK not set
description: main.rs calls bootstrap_store.create_space (not create_space_full) to create the default space. create_space only inserts the space row with no space_member row for the daemon owner. When users query Space/get or SpaceMember/get they see a space with zero members even though the daemon is effectively the owner. create_space_full exists and does both atomically. The inconsistency will confuse users and generate issues about 'empty space at startup'. Fix: use create_space_full with daemon's own pub_id as the creator.
